75032.subject: Reminder: Please Withdraw Your NFTs Before 3 July 2026
75032.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light !important; supported-color-schemes: light !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .hidden-desktop { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-desktop { display: block !important; } div.mj-group-full-width { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { .hidden-mobile { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-mobile { display: block !important; } } Dear Binancian, Reminder: Please Withdraw Your NFTs Before 3 July 2026 We previously announced we are upgrading the Binance NFT service to be made available on Binance Wallet.  Starting 2026-06-03 , users holding transferable NFTs on Binance will have one-month to withdraw their NFTs to their Binance Wallet or any other compatible wallets of their choice to continue managing their digital assets. This is a reminder to withdraw your transferable NFTs before 2026-07-03 . After that date, users will no longer access support for the current NFT service on Binance Exchange and any NFTs not withdrawn by then will no longer be accessible. CR7 NFT Withdrawal Fee Reimbursement Users who withdraw CR7 NFTs from the Binance NFT platform to any supported wallets by 2026-07-03 23:59 (UTC) are eligible to receive reimbursement. The withdrawal fees will be credited to eligible users’ Binance Spot Accounts by 2026-07-19 . To qualify, users must: Withdraw CR7 NFTs directly from the Binance NFT platform to any supported wallets; Complete the withdrawal on BNB Smart Chain between 2026-06-03 00:00 (UTC) and 2 026-07-03 23:59 (UTC) ; and Have held the NFT(s) on the Binance NFT platform before 2026-06-03 00:00 (UTC) . Please Note:  Only successful withdrawal transactions will qualify for reimbursement. Binance reserves the right to disqualify any user from reimbursement eligibility due to fraudulent or abusive behavior. There may be discrepancies between this original content in English and any translated versions. Please refer to the original English version for the most accurate information, in case any discrepancies arise. Should you have any ques

75031.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Binance withdraws Greece bid
75031.body:
21Shares says bitcoin's post-halving price action 'still looks familiar,' but sees recovery toward $100,000 by year-end | SBI Group launches Japan's first trust bank-backed stablecoin JPYSC | CEA Industries ends proxy fight with YZi Labs, adds Ella Zhang as board director | Mark Cuban, Dallas Mavericks face appeal over dismissed Voyager crypto case |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

Figure Markets ( https://figuremarkets.onelink.me/Plnq/theblocknewsletter?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *K33* analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405989/bitcoin-etp-outflows-push-rolling-one-year-flows-negative-first-time-since-2023-k33?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin* investment-product flows have turned negative on a rolling one-year basis for the first time since late 2023, with record ETP outflows pointing to broad investor capitulation.

In today's newsletter, *Binance* looks beyond Greece to secure an EU license ahead of a key July 1 deadline, *21Shares* sees a *bitcoin* recovery toward $100,000 by year-end, *SBI Group* launches its *JPYSC* stablecoin, and more.

Meanwhile, *CryptoQuant* says *Strategy* should pause ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405885/cryptoquant-strategy-should-pause-bitcoin-purchases-rebuild-cash-reserves?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) its *bitcoin* purchases and rebuild its cash reserves.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out *The Starting Block* : Catch an exclusive, in-person livestream ( https://www.youtube.com/@theblockcrypto?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) interview with *Binance* founder *Changpeng "CZ" Zhao* as *The Block* launches its new daily live show on *X* and *YouTube* on June 29 at 8 a.m. ET.

*THE BIG ONE*

*🇪🇺 Binance co-CEO remains 'committed' to securing EU license after exchange withdraws Greece bid*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/406009/binance-ceo-remains-committed-securing-eu-license-exchange-withdraws-greece-bid?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Binance* withdrew its *MiCA* license application in *Greece* and will now pursue authorization in another *EU* member state.

* Co-CEO *Richard Teng* said Binance remains committed to securing a MiCA license in the coming months despite the regulatory uncertainty.
* However, Binance has just one week to secure a license before the bloc-wide July 1 MiCA deadline, after which it would have to cease EU operations.
* "We will take the necessary steps before July 1 to remain compliant with applicable requirements," Binance said Wednesday. "This means some users may be impacted, and we will communicate directly with affected users to provide clear information on next step

75023.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 24
75023.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-24-cryptobeholder-fcpkf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BgssZCekDToOyydX%2FAPnKoA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3-m0TaN-Njhck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqsa0sxy~e0-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqsa0sxy-e0
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin has entered historically bearish chart territory as the debasement trade unwinds across gold, silver, and crypto alike — with Fed hawkishness, Strategy's treasury under strain, and DeFi absorbing its worst year of hacks. Regulatory clarity remains the market's only visible lifeline, hanging on seven Senate votes. 📉 Bitcoin Crashes Into the Rainbow Chart's "BTC Is Dead" Zone A 50% decline from its recent highs has pushed Bitcoin below the floor of its famous Rainbow Chart — a band historically labeled "BTC is Dead." The breach has reignited debate among analysts about whether this represents capitulation or the start of deeper losses. 10x Research has warned that a slide to $55,000 is plausible, citing a strengthening U.S. dollar and the Fed's increasingly hawkish posture under new chair Kevin Warsh as the primary headwinds keeping pressure on crypto through the summer. Read full story 📊 Gold, Silver and Bitcoin Tumble as the Debasement Trade Unwinds The multi-asset "debasement trade" — the thesis that hard assets protect against currency debasement — is collapsing simultaneously across gold, silver, and Bitcoin. Gold has fallen below $4,000 for the first time since November 2025, down 28% from its all-time high. Silver has shed more than 50% from its peak. In just 30 hours, the combined precious metals decline erased an estimated $1.5 trillion in market value, as markets begin to price in Federal Reserve rate hikes — a move that raises the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding assets and pressures risk assets broadly. More details 🏦 Strategy (MSTR) Hits 23-Month Low — CryptoQuant Warns Dividend Coverage Down to 14 Months MicroStrategy — rebranded Strategy — has fallen to $103, its lowest level in 23 months and down approximately 81% from its all-time high, erasing roughly $153 billion in market capitalization. The company's 847,363 BTC holdings are sitting at an estimated $11.2 billion in unrealized losses. On-chain analytics firm CryptoQuant has sounded a formal alarm: cash reserves have dropped 38% from prior levels and now cover only 14 months of dividend obligations, down from a seven-year coverage window. CryptoQuant is recommending the company pause all Bitcoin purchases and focus on rebuilding its balance sheet. Read more 🔴 DeFi TVL Collapses 39% in 2026 Amid Market Dow

74975.subject: Investičná analýza portfólií - p. Balogh
74975.body:
Ahoj Oleg,

Nižšie ti posielam v prílohe tvoje analýzy, ktoré si mi doručil, sú správne prepočítané, veľmi šikovne si sa s tým popasoval.

Teraz pokec k investičnej situácii klienta:

V prvom rade veľmi oceňujem spôsob rozloženia svojho portfólia, ktoré má p. Balogh. Je vidieť, že k svojim financiám pristupuje veľmi zodpovedne a aj diverzifikuje ( rozkladá riziko a prostriedky ) do viacerých fondov. Sú to všetko bankové fondy, čo znamená:


  *
Nie je oslobodený od zdaňovania ziskov 19%. Banka mu v budúcnosti pri výbere zdaní zisk, ak presiahne hranicu 500 €. Takže ani jeden z týchto 5 fondov nie je ETF a tým pádom bude výnosy / zisky zdaňovať v budúcnosti, respektíve, bude mu ich zdaňovať banka.
  *
Výkonnosť portfólií na slovenské pomery nie sú zlé, avšak daň ich oreže približne o 20% z toho, čo klient aktuálne vidí v aplikácii ako čistý zisk. Pretože na webe vidíme výnosy hrubé, bez odpočtu priebežných poplatkov. V appke klient vidí výnosy očistené od poplatkov, ale daň sa zrazí až keď bude peniaze vyberať so ziskom nad 500 €.
  *
Portfólio od ČSOB - KBC We digitize - k tomuto poviem len toľko, že ide o mladý fond, približne má 4-ročnú históriu a založený bol tesne pred výstrelom digitalizácie v zhodnotení, pred príchodom AI, preto 33% výnos ročne ( 33% p.a. ) za 4 roky nech klient nepovažuje, že takto to bude stále, reálny ročný výkon fondov, so zámerom na digitalizáciu činí a bude robiť približne 15-25% p.a. ( tie kvalitnejšie fondy z 10-ročného priemeru ). Tie, ktoré budú pod 15% p.a., tie sú slabšie postavené firmami vo vnútri a tých je na trhu veľa. Náš digitálny má približne výkonnosť 21,5% p.a., čo je veľmi zdravé a tento priemer je za obdobie už 10 rokov a nie 4 roky. Ale našiel som predpokladaný ukazovateľ daného fondu od Morningstar, ktorý potvrdzuje tvojich približne 16% ročne, že bude dosahovať.


  *
KBC ČSOB - We digitize - lepšia voľba na trhu
  *
KBC ČSOB - Svetový akciový fond - slabší priemer na trhu
  *
KBC ČSOB fér rastový fond - lepší priemer na trhu
  *
KBC ČSOB Equity fund world - lepší priemer na trhu
  *
Slovenská sporiteľňa - lepší priemer na trhu


  *
Náš ETF InterFin dynamic poráža prakticky každý jeden fond. Vyrovnaný súbor v rámci výkonnosti má s We Digitize od KBC ČSOB, avšak, obrovský rozdiel v zhodnotení do peňazí nastáva po zdanení klienskych peňazí vo fonde We Digitize.
  *
Náš ETF INTF Dynamic prakticky v porovnaní ( ako si správne vypočítal ) je v porovnaní o 60% a viac silnejší a efektívnejší pre klienta ako všetkých 5 jeho portfólií v priemere.

Pán Balogh to má pekne našliapnuté do budúcna, ale dokážeme mu vytvoriť odklonenie a zefektívniť zhodnotenie jeho prostriedkov o viac ako 60%. Cesta, po ktorej kráča nie je zlá, je to lepší priemer na trhu, avšak mohol byť pokračovať v nadpriemere s našim mentorským servisom, informáciami a edukáciou k tomu.
Pánovi Baloghovi by som rád navrhol hodinové osobné stretnutie, konzultáciu, povedať si plusy / mínusy... položiť čísla a

74970.subject: Zálohová FA za vzdelávanie
74970.body: Dobrý deň, v prílohe Vám posielame zálohovú faktúru za vzdelávanie. Po uhradení zálohovej faktúry Vám sprístupníme vzdelávanie OFV v aplikácii SBAeduca. Ak máte stále platné osvedčenie v rovnakom sektore, kurz Vám sprístupníme najskôr 60 dní pred koncom platnosti aktuálneho osvedčenia. POZOR DÔLEŽITÁ INFORMÁCIA: Kurz Vám bude sprístupnený po pripísaní platby na náš účet. Proces je automatický a nie je možné ho urýchliť zaslaním dokladu o platbe. Ak na faktúre nemáte uvedené správne fakturačné údaje prosím kontaktujte nás pred úhradou faktúry ideálne emailom na adrese podpora@sbaeduca.sk. Ak už pracujete v inej spoločnosti neprihlasujte sa na svoje pôvodné užívateľské konto v aplikácii, ale pošlite si prihlášku ako nový neregistrovaný používateľ. V novej prihláške budete mať možnosť zadať aj správne fakturačné údaje. S pozdravom Henrieta Imamovič 0911 117778

74938.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
74938.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/a761cad4108b33fcd795b1c249c311e789827fd1/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.
